examples: The next day a picnic was arranged in a beautiful coppice.
Several coppice plantations have been seeded with poplar willow and alder.
The basis of management is earnest protection for the Fanjinshan's coppice.
The four bodies were found at Poles Coppice at Pontesbury Hill, near Shrewsbury, on 16 July.
Ceri Fuller, 35, Samuel, 12, Rebecca, eight, and Charlotte, seven, were found at Poles Coppice in Shropshire.
